name: extract_structured_data
description: Extracts structured data from HTML using CSS selectors or JSON-LD/schema.org markup. Use this skill to scrape product info, article metadata, tables, or any structured content from web pages. Returns data as JSON.

url.description: The URL of the page to extract data from.

html.description: Raw HTML content to extract from. Use when you already have the HTML.

selectors.description: CSS selectors mapping field names to extraction rules. E.g., {"title": "h1", "price": ".price"}.

schema_type.description: Optional schema.org type to extract (e.g., 'Product', 'Article'). Extracts JSON-LD if present.
